programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A Coast Guard rescue swimmer (Kevin Costner), who still mourns losing his crew in a fatal accident, copes by dedicating his life to training new recruits, so when he meets swimming champion Jake Fischer (Ashton Kutcher), he molds the cocky young man into his protege and takes him on a mission in the dangerous waters of the Bering Strait.

In Japan, Miyagi is surprised to discover that his old sweetheart, Yukie, has remained single. Meanwhile, Daniel is attracted to Yukie's niece, Kumiko. programme.title: The Karate Kid

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell his or her story, making the others see them a little differently -- and when the day ends, they question whether school will ever be the same.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: With the occasion all but overshadowed by her sister's upcoming wedding, angst-ridden Samantha (Molly Ringwald) faces her 16th birthday with typical adolescent dread. programme.title: Shut In
programme.desc: Mary Portman is a widowed child psychologist who lives in isolation in rural Maine. The horrific car accident that killed her husband also left her 18-year-old stepson Stephen in a bedridden, catatonic state, leaving him completely dependent on her. programme.title: Red Sparrow
programme.desc: Prima ballerina Dominika Egorova faces a bleak and uncertain future after she suffers an injury that ends her career. programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank.

programme.title: Trance
programme.desc: Simon (James McAvoy), a fine-art auctioneer, joins a gang of thieves led by Franck (Vincent Cassel) to steal a priceless Goya painting. programme.title: Beirut
programme.desc: In the 1980s Beirut, Mason Skiles is a former U.S. diplomat who is called back into service to save a colleague from the group that is possibly responsible for his own family's death. Meanwhile, a CIA field agent who is working undercover at the American embassy is tasked with keeping Mason alive and ensuring that the mission is a success.

programme.title: Alex Cross
programme.desc: Alex Cross (Tyler Perry) works as a detective/psychologist for the Detroit Police Department along with his lifelong friend, Tommy Kane (Edward Burns), and detective Monica Ashe (Rachel Nichols). Cross' latest case puts him on a collision course with Picasso (Matthew Fox), a cunning serial killer whose ultimate target is multinational industrialist Giles Mercier (Jean Reno). programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: Room
programme.desc: Held captive for years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: The Eyes of Tammy Faye

programme.title: River of No Return

programme.desc: A cocky ad executive, Marcus (Eddie Murphy) has a reputation as a ladies' man. However, Marcus gets a taste of his own medicine when a merger finds him working under the beautiful Jacqueline (Robin Givens), who has a similarly cavalier attitude about romance. programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: On a magical night when they are in their 20s, Jonathan (John Cusack) meets Sara (Kate Beckinsale). He finds it love at first sight, but Sara believes in destiny. After 10 years the two -- with 3,000 miles between them -- must decide if fate wants them to be together again. When love feels like magic, it is called destiny; when destiny has a sense of humor, it is serendipity.

programme.title: Down to Earth
programme.desc: When amateur comedian Lance Barton (Chris Rock) finds himself at Heaven's door, he is convinced there has been a mistake. Miraculously he is right. programme.title: The Real Charlie Chaplin

programme.title: Hitsville: The Making of Motown

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Looking for any way to get away from the life and town he was born into, Tripp (Lucas Till), a high school senior, builds a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars. After an accident at a nearby oil-drilling site displaces a strange and subterranean creature with a taste and a talent for speed, Tripp may have just found the key to getting out of town with a most unlikely friend.

programme.title: Río
programme.desc: Captured by smugglers when he was just a hatchling, a macaw named Blu never learned to fly and lives a happily domesticated life in Minnesota with his human friend, Linda. programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Dr. Indiana Jones, a renowned archeologist and expert in the occult, is hired by the U.S. Government to find the ark of the covenant, which is believed to still hold the Ten Commandments. Unfortunately, Hitler's agents are also after the ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion escape from various close scrapes in a quest that takes them from Nepal to Cairo.

programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

It is one woman's fearless quest crisscrossing the globe, in an amazing attempt to save the world.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers

A photo of U.S. servicemen raising the flag on Mount Suribachi becomes an iconic symbol of victory to a war-weary nation. The individuals themselves become heroes, though not all survive the war and realize it.

Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman.

Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler.

programme.desc: Peggy faints and wakes up to find herself back in 1960, leading her to try to spot and correct the mistakes that led to disappointments and an unhappy marriage.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for
programme.desc: SpongeBob journeys to the ocean's depths to face the Flying Dutchman's ghost, encountering challenges and uncovering marine mysteries.

programme.title: LifeHack
programme.desc: Kyle and his friends hack for fun, pranking online scammers. Seeking a bigger thrill, they target a billionaire's cryptocurrency..

programme.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
programme.desc: The daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert. Eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she returns.

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: Action thriller set across a dystopian US, following a team of journalists as they race to the White House before a faction of rebels do.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: Tasked by Frankenstein to create a companion, Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change.

programme.title: Critters

programme.title: If You Were The Last
programme.desc: Adrift in space with little hope of rescue, two astronauts argue over whether they're better off spending their remaining days as friends or something more. Romantic comedy.

programme.title: The Lawnmower Man
programme.desc: A simple-minded gardener is transformed into a genius, but plots his bloody revenge when he realises he's been exploited. Sci-fi horror with Jeff Fahey and Pierce Brosnan.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: A troubled priest and a novice nun battle a malevolent force when they're sent to investigate the apparent suicide of a Romanian nun.

programme.title: The Last Starfighter
programme.desc: A video game expert finds himself transported to another planet after conquering a game, only to discover it was just a test. Classic sci-fi action adventure.

programme.title: Ghostbusters 2
programme.desc: A ghostly painting wreaks havoc in New York... who you gonna call? Comedy sequel starring Bill Murray and Dan Aykroyd. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, two brothers return to their hometown, realising that an even greater evil is waiting for them.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman involved in a car accident wakes up in a cramped underground bunker with two men she's never met. Tense thriller.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Black photographer Daniel Kaluuya is anxious about meeting his white girlfriend's parents... and rightly so. Horror directed by Jordan Peele.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: Bone Lake
programme.desc: A couple's holiday is upended when they're forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation.

programme.title: Hostages
programme.desc: Comedy thriller about five strangers caught in an unfolding terrorism situation. Language.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six federal agents in hiding after the LA terror attack grow suspicious of each other as they realise the perpetrator could be among them.

programme.title: The Plague

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: Siblings Josh Gadd and Kaya Scodelario discover a dead body in their parents' basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime. Language/violence/sex/mature themes.
